---
title: "TBD"
subtitle: "TBD"
author: "Azeglio Martinelli"
date: today
number-sections: true
number-depth: 3
format:
    pdf:
        fontsize: 10pt
---

# Table of Contents

# Summary

# Requirements & Configuration


```{python}
#| label: loading-imports

import sys
!{sys.executable} -m pip install -r requirements.txt

import pymongo
from pymongo.errors import ConnectionFailure
import pprint as pp
import pandas as pd
import requests
import json
import time
import string
import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
```

```{python}
#| label: config

# API and Database details
load_dotenv()

# MongoDB
CNX_STR = os.getenv("MONGO_URI")
DB_NAME = "spacexdb"

# SpaceX API endpoints
LAUNCHES_URL = "https://api.spacexdata.com/v4/launches"
ROCKETS_URL = "https://api.spacexdata.com/v4/rockets"
LAUNCHPADS_URL = "https://api.spacexdata.com/v4/launchpads"
```


# ELT Process

## DB Setup

```{python}
#| label: connection

# Connection to MongoDB
client = pymongo.MongoClient(CNX_STR)
db = client[DB_NAME]

launches_raw = db["launches_raw"]
rockets_raw = db["rockets_raw"]
launchpads_raw = db["launchpads_raw"]
```

```{python}
#| label: test-connection

# Test connection
try:
    # The ping command is cheap and does not require auth.
    client.admin.command('ping')
    print('Ping succesful!')
    print(f"Available collections: : {(db.list_collection_names())}")
except ConnectionFailure:
    print("Server not available!")
```

```{python}
#| label: optional-drop-of-raw-collections
#| eval: false

# OPTIONAL: delete raw data
launches_raw.drop()
rockets_raw.drop()
launchpads_raw.drop()

print("launches_raw:", launches_raw.count_documents({}))
print("rockets_raw:", rockets_raw.count_documents({}))
print("launchpads_raw:", launchpads_raw.count_documents({}))
```

## Raw Data Loading

```{python}
#| label: loading-raw-data

# Load raw launches data into launches_raw
response = requests.get(LAUNCHES_URL)
response.raise_for_status()

launches_data = response.json()

print(f"Launches downloaded: {len(launches_data)}")

if launches_data:
    launches_raw.insert_many(launches_data)

print("Documents in launches_raw:", launches_raw.count_documents({}))

# Load raw rockets data into rockets_raw
response = requests.get(ROCKETS_URL)
response.raise_for_status()

rockets_data = response.json()

print(f"Rockets downloaded: {len(rockets_data)}")

if rockets_data:
    rockets_raw.insert_many(rockets_data)

print("Documents in rockets_raw:", rockets_raw.count_documents({}))

# Load raw launchpads data into launchpads_raw
response = requests.get(LAUNCHPADS_URL)
response.raise_for_status()

launchpads_data = response.json()

print(f"Launch pads downloaded: {len(launchpads_data)}")

if launchpads_data:
    launchpads_raw.insert_many(launchpads_data)

print("Documents in launchpads_raw:", launchpads_raw.count_documents({}))
```

## Data Inspection

```{python}
#| label: sanity-check-raw-data

# Quick sanity check
print("launches_raw sample:")
print(launches_raw.find_one({}, {"name": 1, "date_utc": 1, "rocket": 1, "launchpad": 1}))

print("\nrockets_raw sample:")
print(rockets_raw.find_one({}, {"name": 1, "cost_per_launch": 1, "success_rate_pct": 1}))

print("\nlaunchpads_raw sample:")
print(launchpads_raw.find_one({}, {"name": 1, "full_name": 1, "locality": 1, "region": 1}))
```

```{python}
#| label: check-null/missing

# check for null/missing fields
important_fields = ["id", "name", "date_utc", "success", "rocket", "launchpad", "cores", "payloads"]

for field in important_fields:
    missing_or_null = launches_raw.count_documents({
        "$or": [
            {field: {"$exists": False}},
            {field: None}
        ]
    })
    print(f"{field}: {missing_or_null}")
```

```{python}
#| label: check-date-quality

# check date quality
pp.pprint(list(launches_raw.aggregate([
    {
        "$project": {
            "name": 1,
            "date_utc": 1,
            "date_type": {"$type": "$date_utc"}
        }
    },
    {"$limit": 10}
])))
```


```{python}
#| label: check-success-values

# check success values
pp.pprint(list(launches_raw.aggregate([
    {
        "$group": {
            "_id": "$success",
            "count": {"$sum": 1}
        }
    },
    {"$sort": {"count": -1}}
])))
```

```{python}
#| label: inspect-array-sizes-of-cores-and-payloads

# inspect array sizes of cores and payloads
pp.pprint(list(launches_raw.aggregate([
    {
        "$project": {
            "name": 1,
            "core_count": {"$size": {"$ifNull": ["$cores", []]}},
            "payload_count": {"$size": {"$ifNull": ["$payloads", []]}}
        }
    },
    {"$limit": 10}
])))
```


```{python}
#| label: check-launches-empty-arrays

# check launches empty cores and payloads
print("Launches with empty/missing cores:",
      launches_raw.count_documents({
          "$expr": {"$eq": [{"$size": {"$ifNull": ["$cores", []]}}, 0]}
      }))

print("Launches with empty/missing payloads:",
      launches_raw.count_documents({
          "$expr": {"$eq": [{"$size": {"$ifNull": ["$payloads", []]}}, 0]}
      }))
```


## Data Cleaning & Transformation

```{python}
#| label: optional-drop-of-stage-collections
#| eval: false

launches_stage.drop()
launchpads_stage.drop()
rockets_stage.drop()
```

```{python}
#| label: stage-rockets

rockets_stage = db["rockets_stage"]

pipeline = [
    {
        "$set": {
            "_id": "$id",
            "first_flight_date": {"$dateFromString": {"dateString": "$first_flight"}}

        }
    },
    {
        "$project": {
            "_id": 1,
            "name": 1,
            "cost_per_launch": 1,
            "success_rate_pct": 1,
            "country": 1,
            "company": 1,
            "first_flight_date": 1
        }
    },
    {
        "$merge": "rockets_stage"
    }
]

list(rockets_raw.aggregate(pipeline))
print(rockets_stage.count_documents({}))
```


```{python}
#| label: stage-launchpads

launchpads_stage = db["launchpads_stage"]

pipeline = [
    {
        "$set": {
            "_id": "$id",
            "location": {"$concat": ["$locality", ", ", "$region"]}
        }
    },
    {
        "$project": {
            "_id": 1,
            "name": 1,
            "full_name": 1,
            "locality": 1,
            "region": 1,
            "latitude": 1,
            "longitude": 1,
            "launch_attempts": 1,
            "launch_successes": 1,
            "location": 1
        }
    },
    {
        "$merge": "launchpads_stage"
    }
]

list(launchpads_raw.aggregate(pipeline))
print(launchpads_stage.count_documents({}))
```

```{python}
#| label: stage-launches

launches_stage = db["launches_stage"]

pipeline = [
    {
        "$set": {
            "_id": "$id",
            "date": {"$dateFromString": {"dateString": "$date_utc"}}
        }
    },
    {
        "$set": {
            "launch_year": {"$year": "$date"},
            "core_count": {"$size": {"$ifNull": ["$cores", []]}},
            "payload_count": {"$size": {"$ifNull": ["$payloads", []]}}
        }
    },
    {
        "$project": {
            "_id": 1,
            "name": 1,
            "date": 1,
            "launch_year": 1,
            "success": 1,
            "rocket": 1,
            "launchpad": 1,
            "cores": 1,
            "payloads": 1,
            "core_count": 1,
            "payload_count": 1
        }
    },
    {
        "$merge": "launches_stage"
    }
]

list(launches_raw.aggregate(pipeline))
print(launches_stage.count_documents({}))
```


# Data Model


# Analysis

## Launch success rate by rocket

```{python}
#| label: launch-success-rate-by-rocket-type

# Analysis 1: Launch success rate per rocket type
pipeline_success_by_rocket = [
    {
        "$match": {
            "success": {"$in": [True, False]}  # exclude null (upcoming)
        }
    },
    {
        "$lookup": {
            "from": "rockets_stage",
            "localField": "rocket",
            "foreignField": "_id",
            "as": "rocket_info"
        }
    },
    {
        "$unwind": "$rocket_info"
    },
    {
        "$group": {
            "_id": "$rocket_info.name",
            "total_launches": {"$sum": 1},
            "successful": {"$sum": {"$cond": ["$success", 1, 0]}},
            "failed": {"$sum": {"$cond": ["$success", 0, 1]}},
            "cost_per_launch": {"$first": "$rocket_info.cost_per_launch"}
        }
    },
    {
        "$project": {
            "_id": 0,
            "rocket": "$_id",
            "total_launches": 1,
            "successful": 1,
            "failed": 1,
            "success_rate_pct": {
                "$round": [
                    {"$multiply": [
                        {"$divide": ["$successful", "$total_launches"]},
                        100
                    ]},
                    1
                ]
            },
            "cost_per_launch": 1
        }
    },
    {"$sort": {"total_launches": -1}}
]

results = list(launches_stage.aggregate(pipeline_success_by_rocket))
df_success = pd.DataFrame(results)
df_success

```

## Most active launchpads

```{python}
#| label: launch-frequency-and-success-trend-per-year

# Analysis 2: Launch frequency and success trend per year
pipeline_yearly_trend = [
    {
        "$match": {
            "success": {"$in": [True, False]}
        }
    },
    {
        "$group": {
            "_id": "$launch_year",
            "total": {"$sum": 1},
            "successful": {"$sum": {"$cond": ["$success", 1, 0]}},
            "failed": {"$sum": {"$cond": ["$success", 0, 1]}}
        }
    },
    {
        "$addFields": {
            "success_rate_pct": {
                "$round": [
                    {"$multiply": [
                        {"$divide": ["$successful", "$total"]},
                        100
                    ]},
                    1
                ]
            }
        }
    },
    {"$sort": {"_id": 1}},
    {
        "$project": {
            "_id": 0,
            "year": "$_id",
            "total": 1,
            "successful": 1,
            "failed": 1,
            "success_rate_pct": 1
        }
    }
]

results = list(launches_stage.aggregate(pipeline_yearly_trend))
df_yearly = pd.DataFrame(results)
df_yearly

```

## Launch frequency over time

```{python}
#| lable: core-reuse-analysis

# Analysis 3: Booster reuse
pipeline_core_reuse = [
    {
        "$unwind": "$cores"
    },
    {
        "$match": {
            "cores.core": {"$ne": None},
            "cores.flight": {"$ne": None}
        }
    },
    {
        "$group": {
            "_id": "$cores.core",
            "total_flights": {"$max": "$cores.flight"},
            "landing_attempts": {"$sum": {"$cond": [
                {"$eq": ["$cores.landing_attempt", True]}, 1, 0
            ]}},
            "landing_successes": {"$sum": {"$cond": [
                {"$eq": ["$cores.landing_success", True]}, 1, 0
            ]}},
            "landing_types": {"$addToSet": "$cores.landing_type"}
        }
    },
    {
        "$bucket": {
            "groupBy": "$total_flights",
            "boundaries": [1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 20],
            "default": "20+",
            "output": {
                "core_count": {"$sum": 1},
                "avg_landing_success": {"$avg": "$landing_successes"}
            }
        }
    },
    {
        "$project": {
            "_id": 0,
            "flight_range": "$_id",
            "core_count": 1,
            "avg_landing_success": {"$round": ["$avg_landing_success", 1]}
        }
    }
]

results = list(launches_stage.aggregate(pipeline_core_reuse))
df_reuse = pd.DataFrame(results)
df_reuse
```

## Core reuse analysis
